chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-346 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on M.A No.2852/2024 (Ex/A) 3. For hearing of main case 12-5-2025 Mr. Muhammad Raza Katohar, DPG.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- On 28-4-2025, following order was passed:- “None present for the applicant; same was the position on the last date of hearing. Under the circumstances, this application is liable to be dismissed for non-prosecution; however in the interest of justice adjourned to 12.05.2025.” Today is the same position, none present for the applicant, nor has any intimation received. Under the circumstances, the instant Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Naveed Ali
